title: Apply for registration - Canada.ca
content:
## Apply for registration
How to apply for charitable registration and the information and documentation you will need to provide.
- Create an application document checklist
Interactive tool to create a document checklist to help you with the application process
- Describing your activities
Tips and examples to help you describe your charitable activities
- Activities outside Canada
Information for organizations that conduct, or plan to conduct, activities outside Canada
- Submit your application
Apply online for charitable registration

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
